title: In a Word
author: Greg Ross
summary:
stillicide
n. the dropping of rainwater from the eaves of a house upon another’s land or roof

sub tegmine fagi
adv. under the cover of a beech tree

tenson
n. a contest in verse between rival troubadours
full_text:
stillicide

n. the dropping of rainwater from the eaves of a house upon another’s land or roof

sub tegmine fagi

adv. under the cover of a beech tree

tenson

n. a contest in verse between rival troubadours
